name: Sáhkku
author: Abstract Games factory
description: Sáhkku, the Sámi 'running-fight' dice game (the 'Devil's game'), in the Vuovdaguoika ruleset — the branch with unbroken living transmission. Three stick dice faced X('sáhkku')/II/III/blank (blank moves FOUR) drive 15 soldiers per side around mirrored tracks: your home row, the middle row, then the enemy's row — never home again. An X activates your frontmost sleeping soldier or nudges a piece one line. Land exactly on an enemy soldier — awake or asleep — to capture it. The shared KING starts on the central Castle: land on it to recruit it to your army (pushing it one line ahead, ramming any enemy standing there); it can never be captured, only recruited back. Remove ALL enemy soldiers to win.
